title: people — data retention windows
description: CENTRAL-plane retention. PersonIdentity is the identity of record — retained indefinitely. TenantLinkRequests 3y post-decision (audit trail for consent provenance). GuardianLinks retained while relationship active + 3y post-revocation.

policies.description: INDEFINITE retention while linked to any active tenant. On explicit erasure request (person requests full removal): 90-day grace period + hard-delete + academorix_id blacklisted from reuse. Frozen identities (fraud) retained indefinitely for audit.
Retained while active. 3 years post-revocation with subject IDs anonymized (relationship metadata kept for audit). Never hard-deleted while any tenant record references either PersonIdentity.
3 years post-terminal-state (approved / declined / revoked / expired). Signature purged after 30 days regardless of terminal state (URL becomes invalid).
